seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Semaphore and Semaphore South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Semaphore vs Semaphore South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Semaphore and Semaphore South.
heading: Semaphore vs Semaphore South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Semaphore, South Australia and Semaphore South, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Semaphore South has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Semaphore (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Semaphore or Semaphore South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Semaphore has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Semaphore South scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Semaphore scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Semaphore South scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Semaphore or Semaphore South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Semaphore South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
